eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Mercer, ND; at 11:37 AM on MAY 28, 2026 Effective until 7:37 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Riverdale water treatment facility is facing water production issues due to numerous factors.  Troubleshooting is ongoing and a solution may not be available for an extended period of time.  During this situation, we are requesting those receiving water from our facility (Riverdale, Underwood, Pick City, Pick City cabin sites, Wolf Creek, Lake Sakakawea State Park) limit unnecessary water usage (lawn watering, car washing, filling of swimming pools etc.).  The quality and safety of the water is not a concern.  The issues pertain strictly to how fast water is produced based on pump issues and water supply, not quality of water of produced.  Your cooperation and understanding is appreciated.
